title: High Signal: Agent-readiness audit layer
hook: Your reel gets attention. The agent decides if you are worth trusting.
humanTension: Products that are not legible, cited, and evidence-backed will be filtered out by assistants and buyer agents.
proofBeat: Agent evaluation is becoming part of product selection: products that are not legible, cited, and evidence-backed will be filtered out.
visualBeats: Open on the uncomfortable decision the builder or buyer is trying to make.
Show the world shift: assistants filter products without proof surfaces.
Cut to proof: agent-readiness audit screen with evidence scores.
Add second receipt: missing proof task feed.
Close with the exact next action: run the audit, then fix the first missing proof surface.
caption: Agent-readiness audit layer: build a focused audit slice inside High Signal, not a new broad product.
cta: Run the audit, then fix the first missing proof surface.
claimBoundary: Only use claims backed by the linked evidence; do not turn a weak signal into certainty.
